mainEntity.name: How long does it take for Los Angeles attorneys to see Google AI Overviews citations after SEO improvements?
mainEntity.text: How long does it take for Los Angeles attorneys to see Google AI Overviews citations after SEO improvements?

acceptedAnswer.text: Los Angeles attorneys typically see Google AI Overviews citations 4-8 weeks after SEO improvements like content updates and review boosts, as AI indexes top-ranked pages quickly for high-intent queries.

suggestedAnswer.text: Timeline varies by competition; LA's saturated market requires consistent authority signals. Post-optimization, monitor via incognito searches. Combine with local schema for faster indexing. Note: AI volatility means ongoing maintenance is essential against rivals.
